title: <div>  5  Scope Creep: The brief’s breadth—3D environments, multiple eras, educa
content:
5 Scope Creep: The brief’s breadth—3D environments, multiple eras, educational content, social features, and community modding—risks overcomplicating development, especially for a mobile-first app where simplicity and polish are key.
6 Onboarding Barrier: The timewalk onboarding and layered tutorials, while immersive, may feel slow for players wanting quick gameplay. Balancing education with immediate playability is essential.
Theorizing the Mobile Build Approach
Building Backgammon Chaperone for mobile requires optimizing for performance, accessibility, and engagement while maintaining the brief’s ambitious vision. Below is a detailed approach to implementation, tailored for iOS and Android, with a focus on technical feasibility and user experience.
1. Core UX & 3D Interface
Approach:
• Engine Choice: Use Unity for its robust mobile optimization, cross-platform support, and mature AR Foundation (unifying ARKit/ARCore). Three.js is lighter but less optimized for mobile physics and haptics.
• Touch Gestures: Implement one-finger orbit, two-finger pinch zoom/pan using Unity’s Input System. Add a simplified “tap-to-move” option for casual players to reduce complexity.
